hardened_backend_telemetry.p99_latency_profile: Stabilized under 1.2s via asyncio timeout guards

enforced_api_contracts: Global error boundaries emit bracketed custom exception logs: [VALIDATION_ERROR] and [TENANT_AUTH_ERROR]
POST /api/v1/procurement/ingest-history accepts multi-part form files and stages validated records in PostgreSQL
Track 1 gateway throttles emit [RATE_LIMIT_EXHAUSTED] at HTTP 429 for exhausted tenant or session windows
